codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested CLI entry-point behavior: new src/cli.ts routes serve (default), tail, --help, and --version; package bin points to src/cli.ts; unknown subcommands exit non-zero; and server/cast-tail remain directly executable via import.meta.main.

issues.description: Version path resolution uses `new URL(import.meta.url).pathname`, which preserves URL encoding (e.g. spaces as `%20`). In install paths containing spaces or non-ASCII characters, reading package.json can fail and `--version`/help fallback to `unknown` instead of the real package version.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Typecheck instructions are inconsistent between shared-state docs: impl-worker says `bun tsc --noEmit`, while mission AGENTS says `bunx tsc --noEmit`. This mismatch drove unnecessary failed attempts and incorrect conclusions in the worker run.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/impl-worker/SKILL.md:39 (`bun tsc --noEmit`) vs /Users/dayvidwang/.factory/missions/7e3fa06c-352e-4211-ba3e-661c7dfa2c41/AGENTS.md:55 (`bunx tsc --noEmit`); transcript line 2 for workerSessionId c6e395e9-aadb-470d-a94b-a113205ee403 shows `bun tsc --noEmit`, then `npx tsc --noEmit`, then `... || echo "tsc not installed"`.

summary: Pass with one non-blocking issue. Core feature requirements are met, but package-version path handling is brittle on encoded filesystem paths. Shared-state skill guidance should be aligned on the correct typecheck command.
